title: The Mouse & The Lion
content:
A poor thing the Mouse was, and yet,
    When the Lion got caught in a net,
    All his strength was no use
    'Twas the poor little Mouse
    Who nibbled him out of the net.

    Small Causes May Produce Great Results
meaning:
Walter Crane's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Mouse & The Lion"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
